summary: Build state feature is fully implemented. The state module (intentc/build/state.py) defines TargetStatus enum, BuildStep/BuildResult Pydantic models, StateManager with all required methods (get_status, get_build_result, save_build_result, set_status, mark_dependents_outdated, reset, reset_all, list_targets), VersionControl abstract interface, and GitVersionControl concrete implementation. State is persisted as versioned JSON at .intentc/state/{output-dir}/state.json with an append-only build log at build-log.jsonl. All 29 tests pass covering types, roundtrip persistence, DAG-aware operations, and append-only log behavior.
